title: UAE cracks down on illegal fireworks: Dh100,000 fine and one-year jail for violator
summary_full: The UAE is cracking down on illegal fireworks, imposing hefty fines of at least Dh100,000 and jail time of a year for possession, use, or trade. Authorities are emphasizing safety, warning of severe injuries and panic.  Strict enforcement of federal law targets all unauthorized fireworks activities year-round, urging public cooperation.
